name: James Hardie Industries Plc
analysis: JHX has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 25% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.6× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$34.1200. Trade idea: entry A$34.4600, stop A$30.8286, target A$45.3542 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
